child_geo_events.name: Evacuation Shelter - Window Rock Fighting Scouts Event Center

data.information:
Shelter for evacuees are open at the Window Rock Fighting Scouts Event Center, located in Fort Defiance, Arizona. This location will be the primary emergency evacuation shelter for the Oak Ridge Fire evacuees.

Per Navajo Police Department on Facebook.

data.information:
The Navajo Nation Fair Grounds Dean Jackson Arena is available for evacuated livestock. Call (928) 270-8062 or (928) 270-2254 to coordinate drop off.

Per Navajo Police Department on Facebook.

data.evacuation_orders: The area south of Highway 138 between the 15 Freeway and Highway 173 are now under an evacuation order, per San Bernardino County Sheriff's Department on X. This is known as Zone ONFLY_16054616-0 on the San Bernardino Evacuation Area Status Map.
data.evacuation_warnings: The area north of Highway 138/Highway 173 from Summit Valley Road to Arrowhead Lake Road is now under an evacuation warning. Those who require additional time to evacuate, and those with pets and livestock should leave now, per San Bernardino County Sheriff's Department via Wireless Emergency Alert. This is known as Zone ONFLY_16054862-0 on the San Bernardino Evacuation Area Status Map.
